---
title: "*GATA2* Variant Explorer"
page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## How to use the explorer

-   Use the **search box** (top right) to search across all columns.
-   Use the **column filters** (under each header) to filter specific fields.
-   Helpful search terms to try:
    -   Variant type: `missense`, `nonsense`, `frameshift`, `splice_site`, `inframe_indel`, `inframe_ins`, `inframe_del`
    -   Protein region: `N_tail`, `N_finger`, `spacer`, `C_finger`, `C_tail`
    -   Origin: `germline`, `somatic`, `mixed`
    -   Database IDs: `ClinVar`, `All_of_Us`, `gnomAD`, `COSMIC`
    -   HGVS: `c.`, `p.`, or a position like `345` or `354`
-   Tip: You can combine terms in the global search (e.g., `C_finger missense`).

```{=html}
<style>
/* Make the content span full width */
main.content { max-width: 100% !important; }

/* Make the DT wrapper use full width */
.dataTables_wrapper { width: 100% !important; }

/* Prevent wrapping so more columns fit horizontally */
table.dataTable th, table.dataTable td { white-space: nowrap; }
</style>
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)

variants <- read_csv(
  "data/gata2_variants_v1_2025-12-19.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

# Columns to hide by default
hide_idx <- 0:4

# Long-text columns to truncate
long_cols <- intersect(c("clinical_refs", "functional_refs", "associated_phenotype"), names(variants))
long_idx <- match(long_cols, names(variants)) - 1
long_idx <- long_idx[!is.na(long_idx)]  # remove any NA targets safely

# Build columnDefs safely
coldefs <- list()

if (length(hide_idx) > 0) {
  coldefs <- append(coldefs, list(list(visible = FALSE, targets = hide_idx)))
}

if (length(long_idx) > 0) {
  coldefs <- append(coldefs, list(list(
    targets = long_idx,
    width = "260px",
    render = JS(
      "function(data, type, row, meta) {",
      "  if (type !== 'display' || data === null) return data;",
      "  data = data.toString();",
      "  var short = data.length > 70 ? data.substr(0, 70) + '…' : data;",
      "  return '<span title=\"' + data.replace(/\"/g,'&quot;') + '\">' + short + '</span>';",
      "}"
    )
  )))
}

DT::datatable(
  variants,
  filter = "top",
  options = list(
    pageLength = 25,
    lengthMenu = list(c(25, 50, 100, 250, -1), c("25", "50", "100", "250", "All")),
    scrollX = TRUE,
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    columnDefs = if (length(coldefs) == 0) NULL else coldefs
  )
)
```
